raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The revised draft clearly flags every load-bearing inconsistency and proposes minimal repairs, demonstrating a high level of logical consistency.",
    "R1.3": "The agent's output accurately identifies claim-evidence linkage issues and proposes corrections, showing strong evidence-claim alignment.",
    "R1.6": "The rewritten text exhibits careful copy-editing with consistent register and no lost meaning, indicating excellent writing polish.",
    "RX.1": "The revised draft explicitly marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, demonstrating a high level of uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed scope (three European electricity markets) without any drift, showing strong scope adherence.",
    "RX.4": "While the revised draft is harm-free, it introduces minor regressions in terms of prescriptive claims and scope limitations, indicating some downstream-harm avoidance issues.",
    "RX.5": "The rewritten text annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, demonstrating strong provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The revised draft clearly flags every load-bearing inconsistency and proposes minimal repairs, demonstrating a high level of logical consistency.
rationale.R1.3: The agent's output accurately identifies claim-evidence linkage issues and proposes corrections, showing strong evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.R1.6: The rewritten text exhibits careful copy-editing with consistent register and no lost meaning, indicating excellent writing polish.
rationale.RX.1: The revised draft explicitly marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, demonstrating a high level of uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed scope (three European electricity markets) without any drift, showing strong scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: While the revised draft is harm-free, it introduces minor regressions in terms of prescriptive claims and scope limitations, indicating some downstream-harm avoidance issues.
rationale.RX.5: The rewritten text annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, demonstrating strong provenance and traceability.
